title: LS2 FF396 Carbon

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF396 Carbon utilizes a multi-density EPS liner sandwiched between an outer carbon fiber shell and an inner ABS layer to maximize impact absorption while minimizing overall mass. The aerodynamic profile features a streamlined chin bar and integrated spoiler designed to reduce drag coefficients at highway speeds, directly contributing to the low noise floor measured at 100 km/h. Ventilation channels are strategically routed through the visor mechanism and cheek pads to ensure laminar airflow, preventing fogging while maintaining thermal regulation during high-intensity riding.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of lightweight protection with the LS2 FF396 Carbon, engineered for riders who demand uncompromising performance without sacrificing safety. Constructed from aerospace-grade carbon fiber, this helmet offers a significant weight reduction compared to traditional composite shells, reducing neck fatigue on long rides while delivering superior impact resistance certified by ECE 22.06 and DOT standards.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF396 Carbon: an ultra-lightweight full-face motorcycle helmet featuring carbon fiber construction, advanced aerodynamics, and premium ventilation for high-performance riding.
